rewrite_purpose: Guide reviewers to qualify efficacy or testimonial claims with substantiation framing instead of absolute wording.
summary: Replace absolute efficacy or testimonial claims with qualified language supported by substantiation or typical-results framing.
rewrite_guidance: TRIGGER: Clinically proven, guaranteed, or 100% efficacy language. ACTION: Qualify with substantiation framing or typical-results wording. CHECK: Testimonial attribution and substantiation file. ESCALATE IF: Absolute cure or miracle language on health products.
review_guidance: ESCALATE IF: No substantiation trace exists for a high-visibility superlative claim.

measurable_criteria.scoring_notes: must_remove_terms on ad text; must_include_concepts on rewrite guidance text.
